---
name: Pull Request
about: Standard PR format for all QuakeGuard contributions
title: "[TYPE] "
---

## Overview
A clear and concise description of what this PR does and why. Include the problem being solved and the approach taken. Reference the originating issue.

## Changes Made
* **Component/File:** Description of what changed and why.
* **Component/File:** Description of what changed and why.

<!-- 
Add one bullet per meaningful change. Be specific — mention file names,
function names, and architectural decisions. Avoid vague entries like "fixed bug".
-->

## Impact & Next Steps
Describe the effect of this change on the rest of the system. Call out any follow-up issues that should be opened as a result of this PR, any known limitations of the current implementation, or any future work this PR unblocks.

## Testing Performed
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

<!--
Be specific. Include what you ran, what environment you tested in,
and what the expected vs actual output was. For backend changes,
always include stress test results if relevant.
-->

## Related Issues
Closes #
